about.title: Ibn Khaldoun University
about.subtitle: Established in 1980, Ibn Khaldoun University is one of Algeria's leading public institutions of higher education. Located in the city of Tiaret, the university serves over 28,000 students across 8 faculties, offering a comprehensive range of undergraduate and graduate programs.
about.subtitleSecondary: The university is named after Ibn Khaldoun, the renowned 14th-century scholar and historian, reflecting our commitment to knowledge, critical thinking, and scholarly excellence.
about.missionText: To provide high-quality education and foster an environment of intellectual curiosity, research excellence, and social responsibility. We prepare graduates who are equipped to contribute meaningfully to Algeria's development and the global knowledge economy.
about.visionText: To be a nationally recognized center of academic excellence and innovation, advancing knowledge through cutting-edge research and producing graduates who are leaders in their respective fields.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do at Ibn Khaldoun University
about.valueExcellenceDesc: We strive for the highest standards of education, research, and innovation, preparing students to lead in their fields.
about.valueInnovationDesc: Our labs and research centers drive discovery across STEM, social sciences, and humanities, producing impactful publications.
about.valueCommunityDesc: We serve the broader community through partnerships, outreach programs, and initiatives that address local and national needs.
about.historySubtitle: Key milestones in the journey of Ibn Khaldoun University
about.timeline1980Desc: Ibn Khaldoun University established in Tiaret, Algeria as a centre universitaire.
about.timeline1992Desc: Elevated to full university status with expanded faculties and research programs.
about.timeline2005Desc: Introduction of digital systems for administration and student services.
about.timeline2015Desc: Opening of new research laboratories and international collaboration agreements.
about.timeline2024Desc: Development of the modern digital platform for pedagogical management.
about.campusLifeSubtitle: A vibrant community of students and faculty shaping the future together
about.ctaSubtitle: Whether you are a prospective student, researcher, or partner, we would love to hear from you.
